FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f821eb6cb40>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T23:10:36Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T23:08:53Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T23:10:36Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T23:08:53Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/01 23:12:07.802084306 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802091189 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802130102 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802131474 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802152744 {
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802153676 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802166580 new <- list()
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802167391 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802214629 new$width <- width
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802215812 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802230980 new$height <- height
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802232042 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802246137 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802248792 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802282095 new$title <- title
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802283268 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802299007 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802301201 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802316129 new$version <- version
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802317031 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802331057 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802331999 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802347477 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802348319 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802361584 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802364239 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802385537 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802393844 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802394846 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802409343 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802410225 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802424641 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802425433 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802439650 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802440411 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802463324 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802464206 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802479254 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802480015 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802494863 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802495694 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802509149 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802509871 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802526742 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802527564 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802541430 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802542221 new$author <- author
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802555776 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802556748 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802576315 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802577056 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802591453 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802592265 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802610699 "default"))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802611440 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802624485 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802625206 }
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802637439 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802638431 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802648698 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802661323 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802662125 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802676642 }
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802677424 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802689626 }
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802690358 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802703011 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802703763 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802717659 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802718450 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802733618 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802734390 }
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802746643 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802747464 old$family <- family
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802762021 }
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802762743 version <- old$version
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802774906 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802775687 "2.0")
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802787978 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802790142 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802814558 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802816562 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802830157 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802831049 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802847159 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802848181 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802863429 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802864200 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802924994 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802926396 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802940653 old$author)
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802941134 invisible()
2026/06/01 23:12:07.802948718 }
